title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 25: Zeyang
description: Chapter 25 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 25 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: Zeyang journeyed to Chu, where Yi Jie spoke of him to the king of Chu. But the king did not grant him an interview, and Yi Jie went home. Pengyang came to ask Yi Jie how he had spoken of Zeyang to the king.
